resume.summary: Information Security Engineer with hands-on experience in Identity and Access Management (IAM), Zero Trust Architecture, Linux Security, and Cloud Security. Experienced in designing authentication and authorization workflows using FreeRADIUS, OpenLDAP, MFA, RBAC, and ABAC principles. Skilled in AWS IAM, access governance, authentication systems, vulnerability research, and system monitoring. Passionate about building secure identity-driven infrastructure and implementing least-privilege access controls across distributed environments.

responsibilities.item: Implemented centralized authentication infrastructure using FreeRADIUS for identity-based access control across PAM, SSH, and VPN systems.
Integrated Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) and least-privilege access controls.
Monitored authentication events, access logs, and RADIUS workflows to improve auditability and security visibility.

job.role: React iOS and Android Developer Intern

responsibilities.item: Developed a cross-platform chatbot application using React Native and WhatsApp integration.
Implemented REST API integrations and optimized application performance and scalability.
Implemented AWS IAM policies, roles, and Amazon Cognito identity controls.
Performed cloud security assessments across AWS services.
Analyzed authentication logs, permissions, trust relationships, and access patterns.

project.name: Zero Trust IAM Lab
project.description: Built a Zero Trust Identity and Access Management environment integrating OpenLDAP and FreeRADIUS with MFA, RBAC, ABAC, Prometheus, and Alertmanager for enterprise-grade authentication, authorization, monitoring, and policy enforcement.

achievements.item: 80% faster incident detection through monitoring and alerting.

degree.institution: Gopalan College of Engineering and Management

publication.title: Rise of ZTA in Cloud System Security
Cybersecurity Attack Prevention Case Study
publication.conference: 3rd National Conference on Emerging Trends and Technology
